query: SELECT p.id, p.customerId, c.name, c.source FROM payments p LEFT JOIN customers c ON p.customerId = c.id WHERE c.source IN ('Gulf') ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AnaPRc1Kpw1Jvjc.659756d42373 --database 6acGApiU8Bjnxuzxb5vkwU --execute SELECT p.id, p.customerId, c.name, c.source FROM payments p LEFT JOIN customers c ON p.customerId = c.id WHERE c.source IN ('Gulf') ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC;
